experience.description: Designing and developing responsive websites and web applications for clients across various industries. Delivering end-to-end solutions from UI design to deployment, with a focus on performance and user experience.

Contributed to frontend development of enterprise web applications. Implemented responsive UI components, integrated REST APIs, and collaborated with senior developers to optimize application performance and code quality.

Led a team of 4 students in designing and implementing IoT-based solutions for real-world problems. Coordinated project milestones, conducted research, and presented findings at institution-level technical symposiums.
